body_excerpt: In addSubInfo of SubscriptionController.java, there is a possible way to force the user to make a factory reset due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local denial of service with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In addSubInfo of SubscriptionController.java, there is a possible way to force the user to make a factory reset due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local denial of service with System
